description: A small hackpad designed to save time on the pointless things.
aiDeclaration: Used Claude for troubleshooting, answering queries that a google and a slack message couldn't fix and for checking over code I wrote myself.

recent.title:
Jarned V1
                        · by Amu
recent.feedback: Hi there , really cool maropad , but rn the demo is of the pcb design , which is not a appropriate demo , a good demo would be a link to github release section of your repo with your pcb and cad files uploaded under the assets section :)
